name: Tea Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar replacement into a bowl.
2. Cut in cold margarine using a pastry blender or your fingers until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Beat egg and evaporated milk together thoroughly.
4. Add the wet ingredients to the dry mixture and stir until just combined.
5. Knead gently on a lightly floured surface for 1-2 minutes.
6. Divide dough into two equal pieces.
7. Roll each piece into a circle about 1/2-inch thick.
8. Cut circles from the rolled dough using a 2-inch round cutter.
9. Place scones on a greased baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
10. Brush tops with milk (from evaporated milk).
11. Bake at 450°F for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Food Exchange per serving of Basic Tea Scones: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE
Calories: 34
